ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., C, D) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "years_coached" INTEGER /* Number of years coached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points (goals + assists) by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes of the player */,
  "time_on_ice_per_game" TEXT /* Average time on ice per game for the player */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the player */,
  "power_play_assists" INTEGER /* Number of power play assists by the player */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored by the player */,
  "short_handed_assists" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed assists by the player */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "shooting_percentage" REAL /* Shooting percentage of the player */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals scored by the player */,
  "faceoff_percentage" REAL /* Faceoff percentage of the player */,
  "shootout_goals" INTEGER /* Number of shootout goals made by the player */,
  "shootout_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of shootout attempts by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, Stanley Cup Finals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes of the player in the game */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Time on ice for the player in the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player in the game */,
  "shooting_percentage" REAL /* Shooting percentage of the player in the game */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "faceoff_percentage" REAL /* Faceoff percentage of the player in the game */,
  "shootout_goals" INTEGER /* Number of shootout goals made by the player in the game */,
  "shootout_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of shootout attempts by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player in the game */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player in the game */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  "penalty_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the penalty in minutes */,
  "penalty_time" TEXT /* Time when the penalty was taken in the game */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty (e.g., Hooking, Holding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_play_situations" (
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power play situation */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team on the power play */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the power play situation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the power play situation */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored during the power play */,
  "power_play_type" TEXT /* Type of power play (e.g., 5-on-4, 5-on-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("situation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_play_situations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_play_situations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "short_handed_situations" (
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each short-handed situation */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team on the short-handed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the short-handed situation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the short-handed situation */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored during the short-handed */,
  "short_handed_type" TEXT /* Type of short-handed (e.g., 4-on-5, 3-on-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("situation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_handed_situations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_short_handed_situations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shootouts" (
  "shootout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shootout */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of goals made in the shootout */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts in the shootout */,
  "shootout_result" TEXT /* Result of the shootout (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shootout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shootouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shootouts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, knee injury) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
